title: BallsPack 3500
description: The best mod pack with precisely (not) chosen mods
body: ## Welcome to the "BallsPack 3500" Modpack! This modpack has a lot of very (not) carefully chosen which (may) work fine. It's purpose is so you can play a lot of different mods without making much sense having some. (And to play the official server) ## Why? 1. Because I can. 2. To play on the official server (_bp3500.sus.dog_) ## What does it have? - yes - Ad Astra - Computers - Decoration stuff - many mods you will never use
